title: Change website theme/visual styling only

requirements.text: Apply a refreshed visual theme across all website sections — update colors, typography, spacing, and decorative styling — while keeping all existing content, text, images, pricing, basket functionality, WhatsApp links (https://wa.me/918143497999), Zomato link (https://zomato.onelink.me/xqzv/v2xa8r5r), navigation structure, and layout hierarchy completely unchanged. Choose a cohesive, polished color palette and typography system and apply it consistently to: Navbar, Hero, About Us, Products, Why Choose Us, Offers, Reviews, Contact, Footer, FloatingWhatsAppButton, and BasketSummary.
acceptanceCriteria: All section headings, body text, product names, descriptions, and pricing remain word-for-word identical to the current version
All WhatsApp links continue to open https://wa.me/918143497999 in a new tab
Zomato link https://zomato.onelink.me/xqzv/v2xa8r5r remains functional and unchanged
Add to Basket, quantity selector, basket summary, and WhatsApp order message functionality remain fully intact
Company logo (company-logo-round.dim_400x400.png) continues to display in Navbar and Hero without modification
All product images (product-idly-dosa-packets.dim_800x600.png, product-rustic-kitchen.dim_800x600.png, product-vada-ragi.dim_800x600.png, and existing ragi batter images) remain in place
Google Maps iframe and full business address remain in the Contact section
A new cohesive color palette and typography system is applied consistently across every component
Website remains fully mobile-responsive with hamburger menu on mobile
No content, navigation links, phone numbers, or section structure is added, removed, or reordered

constraints: Do not change any text content, product descriptions, pricing, phone numbers, addresses, or business information
Do not alter any WhatsApp or Zomato URLs
Do not modify basket/order functionality or logic
Do not replace or resize any existing images
Do not change the section order or navigation structure
Do not edit files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
nonGoals: Changing any written content or copy
Altering basket or WhatsApp order message logic
